changes.newValue: Implemented in internal/mcp/background_indexer.go. In-process goroutine with 5s debounce, MarkDirty() trigger, IndexStatus() returns "ready"/"updating". Incremental reindex is placeholder (actual reindex would call search package ReindexIncremental). Integration with runtimequeue via lease pattern in server.go.
